title: Supply Chain Manager - Bolloré Logistics India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Bolloré Logistics India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Bolloré Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bolloré Logistics India:
Bolloré Logistics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bolloré Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
